name: Rox Resources Limited
analysis: RXL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.4600, stop A$0.3886, target A$0.5450 (1.19:1) — then trail it.
